capabilities.indexLine: divination - reveal, detect, or obscure sight and hidden things
capabilities.promptBlock: Reveal/detect/track spells are addStatus on the target with a status such as revealed; blinding or shrouding sight is addStatus on the caster or target with concealed or a display name like sight_shrouded. Prefer these over inventing a new mechanic.

capabilities.indexLine: barrier_shaping - directional terrain: walls, lines, cones, and cave-ins
capabilities.promptBlock: Directional terrain (wall, line, barrier, between me and X, path, bridge, cone, beam) should be a single createTiles effect covering the whole shape, never a player-centered radius disc and never a list of individual coordinate effects.

capabilities.indexLine: fixture_manifestation - create a single non-actor prop, shrine, marker, hazard, or place feature
capabilities.promptBlock: Use conjureFixture for one discrete world feature: shrines, altars, markers, signs, statues, braziers, wells, plants, hazards, props, or landmarks. Use summon for creatures and createTiles for terrain areas or shaped barriers.
